message:
test: add comprehensive accounts tests (parsing, selection, DB mirror)

wa-nu4.1.5.3: Lock down caut parsing, selection determinism, and DB mirror behavior
to prevent quota/rotation regressions.

- caut.rs: 18 new fixture tests covering multi-account parsing, camelCase aliases,
  missing/null fields, empty responses, error categorization, and remediation coverage
- accounts.rs: 11 new tests covering threshold boundaries, zero-percent handling,
  many-account determinism, stable sort with identical inputs, from_caut edge cases,
  explanation structure, and filter reason text
- storage.rs: 16 new DB mirror integration tests covering upsert insert/update/idempotency,
  last_used_at preservation, sort order (percent DESC + NULL-first LRU), service isolation,
  delete behavior, update errors, and end-to-end upsert-then-select flow

All 1203 wa-core tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
